**Pack is inspried by Spifey.([https://www.youtube.com/@Spifey/featured](https://www.youtube.com/@Spifey/featured))**

Some minecraft textures are changed, same with cursed minecraft images meme back in some years ago(it cursed) be careful or you will be mistaken them!
This is just beta, bugs can appear in different versions(or not idk), newer versions will be released soon.


*nothing to say here more, just try it :)*
